title: Valarian Conquest
description: Valarian Conquest aims to enhance the overall feeling of combat and exploration in the overworld. It adds new factions, structures and mobs in an effort to make the world feel more alive, medieval and explorable.
body:
![Valarian Conquest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FTLgMXgq/images/3c68c6c05d5e31d9962b2ec53ef9f1271c476ae6.png)

Valarian Conquest aims to enhance the overall feeling of combat and exploration in the overworld. It adds new factions, structures and mobs in an effort to make the world feel more alive, medieval and explorable. As of update 4.0 the mod now has numerous factions and unique armor and structures for each of them. Some of the human and fantasy factions from previous versions are still being worked on and will be readded over time in updates. Each of these factions can be joined and allied with and within these factions structures you can find citizens that can be rescued and claimed as your own. Once claimed, these citizens can hold villager professions or combat roles and will remain with you on your journey. Over time my hope is to expand on the features of this mod and add even more exciting gameplay elements. Just keep in mind this is the first time I have attempted a mod so if you find bugs or issues feel free to let me know and I'll do my best to address them.

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/valarian-conquest)
[Discord](https://discord.gg/7aDHD6YVVX)
[Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/ethan919)
